channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wall Street-style scoreboard tracks congressional races with real-money bets
item.description: Kalshi's new Midterms Hub combines live prediction markets with polling, fundraising data and historical results to track House, Senate and governor races.

item.title: House passes funding bill early to avoid election-season shutdown
item.description: The House voted Tuesday to pass a bill funding the federal government, aiming to prevent a shutdown before the midterm elections this fall.

item.title: San Francisco Giants attendance drops; blame is being assigned
Pete Hegseth challenges Democrats over alleged hypocrisy in Senate hearing
